source.note: FULL/verifiable multi-app port; office doc on TextEdit; web grade (65) folds with in-guest file grade (35)

task.en: Relaunch Movie Monday across these seeded apps open in Safari, plus TextEdit. SprintBoard http://localhost:3013, HooliCalendar http://localhost:3017, HangryDash http://localhost:3007, LockedIn http://localhost:3014. (1) On the 'Movie Monday Program' board in SprintBoard, add 6 tasks, each with a title that starts with 'MM:' (for example 'MM: projector rental'). (2) In HooliCalendar, add an event titled 'Movie Monday — Outdoor Relaunch'. (3) In HangryDash, place a dessert order. (4) On LockedIn, post an update that contains the exact phrase 'Movie Monday is back'. (5) In TextEdit, write a short relaunch plan and save it as ~/Documents/Work/movie_monday_plan.txt (create the Work folder; use plain text).

grading_command: ls ~/Documents/Work/ 2>/dev/null | grep -qi movie && echo True || echo False
grep -rqi 'movie monday' ~/Documents/Work/ 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False
